title: MergeManagerImpl
description: The MergeManagerImpl class is responsible for managing the merging of map outputs during the shuffle and sort phase of a MapReduce job. It contains logic for merging in-memory map outputs, as well as logic for merging on-disk map outputs. The class takes inputs in the form of map outputs, which can be either in-memory or on-disk, and produces outputs in the form of merged map outputs, which are written to disk.
